---
id: retrieves-a-photo-thumbnail
title: "Retrieves a photo thumbnail"
description: "Returns the thumbnail image data for a specific photo. On success returns binary image/jpeg data. On error returns JSON with error details."
sidebar_label: "Retrieves a photo thumbnail"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves a photo thumbnail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/photos/{id}/thumbnail"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the thumbnail image data for a specific photo. On success returns binary image/jpeg data. On error returns JSON with error details.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
